specific_questions: Are the utility functions properly typed and following best practices?
Is the 404 page correctly implementing SEO noindex requirement?
Are the Astro components following the existing project patterns?
Is the test coverage adequate for the new functionality?
request.context_summary: Task 2.4 implementation: Added About page and 404 page for Astro SSG migration. Includes utility functions for static page content, Japanese language support, and proper SEO meta tags for 404 (noindex). TDD approach with 100% test coverage on utility functions.
